items.title: Hololive ‘Secret Society holoX’ 1st Album & Live Commemorative Pop Up Store in Tokyo 2026
items.author: Charlotte Davis
items.content: A pop up store celebrating the release of Secret Society holoX's first album Secret ORDER and their first solo live concert First MISSION will be held at HMV and BOOKS SHIBUYA from April 7 to April 30, 2026.

items.title: hololive’s Subaru and Kanade Team Up for CoCo Ichibanya Curry Collab
items.author: Charlotte Davis
items.content: Japanese restaurant chain CoCo Ichibanya has announced a delicious new collaboration with one of the most popular VTuber agencies in the world, hololive.

items.title: Hololive Baseball Game HoloBase Announced for PC
items.author: Charlotte Davis
items.content: Publisher holo Indie and developer Clover Lab announced the upcoming release of holoBase, a pixel art baseball game for PC, on April 1, 2026.

items.title: Monster Hunter Wilds x Hololive Collaboration at Capcom Cafe 2026
items.author: Charlotte Davis
items.content: Capcom will host a special collaboration cafe featuring the latest hunting action title Monster Hunter Wilds and the fifth generation of the virtual YouTuber group Hololive at Capcom Cafe locations in Ikebukuro and Umeda from February 20 to April 9, 2026.
